title: gluta pubescens
intro: Gluta pubescens, also known as the velvet tree or Batai, is a species of plant in the family Anacardiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gluta pubescens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Gluta pubescens include tea, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
